/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/X:COURT REQUIRES FURTHER CLARIFICATION FROM THE DA AND DEFENSE COUNSEL AS THE SENTENCING MINUTES DO NOT STATE WHAT DEFENDANT ISTO COMPLETE AS A PARTOF THEIR PROBATION/X:DEFENDANT IS PRESENT AND INDICATES THAT DMV REQUIRES A COURT ORDER AS TOSPECIFIC CLASSES HE WILL NEED TO COMPLETE/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT STATUS/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH5 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 12 D/CTS 6/PF460 18/VF2 150/LVAL/LCHEM/RESTR/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/DEF:SHALL COMPLY WITH ANY PROGRAMMING SET FORTH BY THE DEPARTMENT OF  MOTOR VEHICLES/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/CONTD:DMV COMPLIANCE IN DEPT 30/DOP/

/CAL DISPOSITION/X THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 005A VIOLATION OF VEHICLE CODE SECTION 23152(B), A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:005/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONT/X:DEFENDANT IS PLACED ON ONE HOUR STANDBY/TE:1 DAY/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 7 AA MEETINGS PER WEEK & SHOW PROOF AT THE FUTURE CALLINGS/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO NOT DRIVE ANY VEHICLE AT ALL/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO POSESS NO ALCOHOL OR DRUGS WITHOUT A VALID PRESCRIPTION/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO NOT ENTER INTO ANY PUBLIC HOUSE OR AN ESTABLISHMENT SERVING ALCOHOL/NTW60/LDPX:08-19-19/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PROGRAM PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT HAS A CA DRIVER'S LICENCE/CONTPROB/
